bench_setup.notes: TIM1 hardware PWM self-test. TIM1 (APB2, 0x40010000) CH1 on PA8 (AF1): PSC=63, ARR=999 → 1 kHz 50% duty. MOE=1 required. TIM2 free-running @ 64 MHz measures period by polling GPIOA IDR bit8 (IDR reads AF-driven pin). Accept 900–1100 Hz (±10%). On PASS: detail0=measured period in 64 MHz counts (~64000). No loopback wiring required.
